message:
fix(codegen): Check imported modules before VM fallback

The needsVMFallback function was checking isVarUncertain for
attribute access (os.curdir, math.pi, etc.) without first checking
if the variable is an imported module. This caused module constants
to incorrectly fall back to VM execution, producing type mismatches.

Added checks for imported_modules and import_aliases before the
uncertainty check, consistent with how .call handler works.
